summary: Iteration 25 - Bibliography display corrections testing (frontend only). Website React app: ALL PASS. Mobile Expo app: ALL PASS after Expo restart. Both platforms correctly filter out forbidden sections (Sijill Project, Bibliographie sélective, Cursus A-E, Module N, Le Sijill Plateforme) and show font size button (A/A+/A++). Note: Mobile app required an Expo restart to pick up the latest code changes.

warnings.issue: ReferenceError: Cannot access 'handleSearch' before initialization - non-blocking error in console

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bibliography display corrections completed. Both React website and Expo mobile app now filter out header/footer sections correctly and include font size toggle.

font_size_button.functional: PASS - Button cycles A → A+ → A++

note: Mobile app required Expo restart to apply latest code changes. The SKIP_PATTERNS regex successfully filters: /^Sijill Project$/i, /^Bibliographie sélective$/i, /^Cursus [A-E]$/i, /^Module \d+/i, /^Le Sijill\s*[—–-]\s*Plateforme/i
